description.zh: 户部负责把产品收入、成本、Token 消耗与交付结果整理成可展示指标。
description.en: Hubu translates product revenue, costs, token usage, and delivery results into presentable metrics.

longDescription.zh: 户部不只是记账，还负责把经营数据变成站点上的可信叙事。它会把日志中的收入与 Token 成本汇总成首页数字，并把产品结果做成可销售的案例说明。
longDescription.en: Hubu does more than bookkeeping. It turns operational data into a credible public narrative by aggregating revenue and token cost from journals into homepage metrics and by framing product outcomes as sellable case studies.

achievements.zh: 把日志里的经营信号统一整理成首页固定指标，不再依赖随手写文案。
achievements.en: Turned scattered journal signals into stable homepage metrics instead of improvised copy.

configSummary.zh: 户部配置包含金额格式、Token 单位、展示周期和产品结果指标的命名规范。
configSummary.en: Hubu configuration contains currency formatting, token units, reporting windows, and naming conventions for product outcome metrics.

scaleSummary.zh: 户部的 Scale 固定要求每篇日志至少包含产出、困难、解决方法、收入与 Token 成本。
scaleSummary.en: Hubu's scale requires every journal to include outputs, blockers, resolutions, revenue, and token cost.
